description: Environment setup and baseline verification - install dependencies, run existing typecheck/lint/test to confirm baseline is green before making changes.
steps: Run `pnpm install` in /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem to install all workspace dependencies
Run `pnpm typecheck` to verify TypeScript compilation passes across the monorepo
Run `pnpm test` to confirm existing test suite passes and record baseline results
Run `pnpm lint` to confirm linting passes
findings: All baseline checks pass. Environment: Node v22.22.3, pnpm 10.28.1, turbo 2.9.14. pnpm install: 1036 packages added in 16.3s (121 workspace projects). pnpm typecheck: 147 tasks successful in 2m19s. pnpm test: 147 tasks successful in 1m20s (tests include quantmail 246, quantchat 193, quantmeet 149, quantdocs 147, quantube 146, quantdrive 103, quantmax 92 tests). pnpm lint: 119 tasks successful in 33.8s. Warning: turbo reports no output files for @quant/database#build task (pre-existing, not blocking).
